taxonomy: Vilfa africana is classified in the family Poaceae. This classification places it in the category of grasses. Within the Poaceae family, Vilfa africana is further classified as a species within the genus Vilfa. The species is native to Africa and is often found in dry to moist regions. The specific classification of Vilfa africana is subject to ongoing research and taxonomic revisions.
